predeploy: node -e "const d=require('$PROJECT_DIR/data/ofac-addresses.json');const B='123456789ABCDEFGHJKLMNPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijkmnopqrstuvwxyz';function b(s){let n=0n;for(const c of s){const i=BigInt(B.indexOf(c));if(i<0n)return null;n=n*58n+i}let h=n.toString(16);if(h.length%2)h='0'+h;return h}const a=d.addresses.map(x=>x.toLowerCase());const t=[];for(const x of d.addresses){if(/^T[a-zA-Z0-9]{33}$/.test(x)){const h=b(x);if(h)t.push(h.slice(0,42).toLowerCase())}}require('fs').writeFileSync('$PROJECT_DIR/public/ofac.json',JSON.stringify({addresses:a,tronHex:t}))"
